case_title: CHIKE UFOMBAH VS. PAUL O. LASHEBIKAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY UFOMBAH, CHIKE AS TO DEFENDANT LASHEBIKAN, PAUL O. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED AUG-08-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LASHEBIKAN, PAUL O.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-05-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, PARTIES HAVE REACHED A STIPULATION. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN LAMBERT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE ELAN LAMBERT. FILED BY UFOMBAH, CHIKE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UFOMBAH, CHIKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LASHEBIKAN, PAUL O. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,610.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
